name: Spicy Applesauce Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and let it cool.
2. Cream shortening and granulated sugar in a bowl until smooth.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and beat well.
4. Blend in applesauce, melted chocolate, and vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon.
6. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until combined.
7. Fold in chopped walnuts.
8. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
10. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25 minutes, or until set.
11. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
12. In a small bowl, mix powdered sugar, 1/8 teaspoon cinnamon, and enough milk to achieve a drizzling consistency.
13. Drizzle the glaze over the warm brownies.
14. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Makes 36 brownies.
